title: antirrhinum glaucophyllum
intro: Antirrhinum glaucophyllum, also known as the bear's beard or snapdragon, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and acting as an expectorant to ease coughs. Traditionally, Antirrhinum glaucophyllum has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
